title: HOMCOM 720 CD/396 DVD Storage Unit, 396 Blu-ray Media Storage Shelf with 16 Compartments and 12 Adjustable Shelves, CD Tower for Living Room, Bedroom, Office, Grey
features: 12 adjustable shelves, holds up to 720 CD: Keep all your collection in a place. CD storage tower either holds 396 DVDs or 396 Blu-rays
Minimal design: A simple-look DVD storage tower - blends in easily with many different inner styles
Stable and safe: Made from particle board, this CD rack is a piece to be used everyday. Comes with anti-tipping straps to fix to the wall
Versatile: Not just a CD storage unit, this piece can hold and show off your favourite ornaments and more
Dimensions: 126.3H x 106.5W x 24D cm. Single shelf: 14H x 47W x 15D cm. Maximum load 30 kg. Easy to assemble
description: Description: This HOMCOM DVD rack showcases 16 shelves, with 12 adjustable shelves: room for up to 720 CDs, 396 DVDs or 396 Blu-rays. Made from particle board, the CD shelf's structure is reliable and is made to be used every day. Coming with anti-tipping straps to fix to a wall, so our HOMCOM DVD shelf doesn't fall forwards and cause damage. Features: ● 16 compartments, with 12 adjustable shelves: room for 720 CDs, 396 DVDs or 396 Blu-rays ● Narrow depth takes little room, so it doesn't get in the way ● Particle board structure is tough and suitable for everyday use in the home ● Smooth and protective melamine coating is easy to wipe clean ● Anti-tipping straps enhance safety and stability ● Maximum load 30 kg, easy to assemble Specifications: ● Colour: Grey ● Material: Particleboard ● Overall Dimension: 106.5W x 24D x 126.3H cm ● Each Compartment Size: 47W x 15D x 14H cm ● Storage Capacity: 720 CD/396 DVD/396 Blu-rays ● Weight Capacity: 30 kg (overall), 2 kg (each compartment) ● Item Label: 836-602V00GY Package Includes: ● 1 x CD Storage Unit ● 1 x Manual
